intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (GSM5746259, Patient 145 Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC → normalization → clustering → UMAP pipeline.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan:

input.title: Scanpy QC + Clustering for GSE192391 Sample 1 (Patient 145 Day 0)
input.summary: Complete QC, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, clustering, and UMAP visualization for the first scRNA-seq sample.
input.rationale: Standard end-to-end single-cell workflow to assess data quality and identify cell clusters in Patient 145 Day 0 PBMC sample.
input.assumptions:
- Input: First sample only (GSM5746259, 7,532 cells × 36,601 genes)
- QC thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial fraction < 0.20
- Normalization: CPM (counts per million) to 1e4, log-transform
- Clustering: Leiden algorithm on Euclidean neighbors in PCA space
- Visualization: UMAP on PCA reduction

steps.title: Load sample and calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Load the first sample from the combined dataset, calculate n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito, and visualize distributions before filtering

steps.title: QC filtering
steps.description: Filter cells: n_genes ≥ 200 & pct_mito < 0.20; report removed cells

steps.title: Normalization and HVG selection
steps.description: Normalize to 1e4 counts/cell, log-transform, select ~2000 highly variable genes

steps.title: PCA and dimensionality reduction
steps.description: Run PCA on HVGs, compute nearest neighbors, and generate UMAP

steps.title: Leiden clustering
steps.description: Cluster with Leiden algorithm on PCA-neighbors graph, report cluster sizes

steps.title: Visualization and marker genes
steps.description: Plot UMAP by cluster; compute marker genes for each cluster
